name: Server Component data fetching with caching
description: Validate that the skill correctly guides creation of a Next.js 15 page using async Server Components for data fetching with appropriate caching configuration.
prompt: Create a Next.js 15 App Router blog post page at app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx that fetches post data from an API using a Server Component. Configure time-based revalidation of 60 seconds, implement loading.tsx for streaming, error.tsx for error handling, and generateMetadata for dynamic SEO metadata based on the post title and description.

assertions.description: Must use an async Server Component function for server-side data fetching without useEffect
Must configure caching/revalidation using segment config or fetch options since Next.js 15 does not cache by default
Must export generateMetadata for dynamic SEO metadata based on fetched post data
Must reference or create loading.tsx for Suspense-based streaming of the route segment
Must NOT use useEffect for data fetching since Server Components fetch data directly on the server

name: Server Action form with validation and revalidation
description: Validate that the skill correctly implements a Server Action for form mutation with Zod validation, error handling, and cache revalidation.
prompt: Implement a Next.js 15 contact form using Server Actions. Create a Server Action in a separate actions.ts file with 'use server' directive that validates name (required, 2-100 chars) and email (required, valid format) with Zod. Return structured errors on failure. Build the form in a Client Component using useActionState for pending/error states. After successful submission, revalidate the /messages path.

assertions.description: Must include the 'use server' directive to mark the function as a Server Action
Must use useActionState hook for managing form submission state and displaying results
Must use Zod for server-side input validation since Server Actions are public HTTP endpoints
Must call revalidatePath or revalidateTag after successful mutation to invalidate stale cached data
Must mark the form component with 'use client' since it uses hooks for interactive state management
